name: Luxury Latex
description: Premium 100% pure natural latex mattresses made from solid GOLS-certified Dunlop latex blocks. Densest organic construction for therapeutic deep sleep and pressure relief.

name: Premium Hybrid
description: Balanced hybrid mattresses blending organic latex with high-density rebonded foam and HR softy transition layers for optimal orthopedic support and pressure distribution.

name: Orthopedic Comfort
description: Value-driven orthopedic mattresses with high-resilience foam cores and custom density transitions. Oeko-Tex certified wrappers and firm spine alignment at accessible prices.
